investigation_summary: Waterloo, IA COVID outbreak: managers ran betting pool on infections; 1,031 workers infected, six dead; sheriff accused firm of misleading health officials. $221.5M chicken price-fixing settlement (2022). Top industrial water polluter in multiple analyses. OSHA citations; injury rates above average. Gulf dead-zone nutrient footprint from supply chain.

profile.tax_summary: Effective rate ~23–25%. Good Jobs First $139M+ documented subsidies.
profile.legal_summary: Waterloo COVID scandal; antitrust in chicken (and ongoing beef/pork matters). Environment America / related reporting on toxic water releases. Wrongful-death suits re COVID.
profile.labor_summary: High-injury processing work; line-speed concerns; immigrant-heavy workforce vulnerabilities; automation reducing headcount post-COVID.
profile.environmental_summary: CAFO-linked pollution; antibiotic use in proteins; CDP Climate D (2023).
profile.political_summary: ~$3.8M lobbying (2023) on line speeds, CAFO rules, labeling.
profile.product_health: Processed meats (WHO Group 1 carcinogen). Recalls for listeria, salmonella, E. coli across brands.
profile.executive_summary: No exec criminal charges summarized in author seed.
